programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham searches for clues related to the existence of the Loch Ness Monster in Scotland. He also visits Australia to learn about a giant lizard called Megalania.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the English countryside to learn about mythical big cats such as the Beast of Bodmin and Beast of Exmoor.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, have truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards joins the excavation of a subterranean chamber in the Yorkshire Dales where Bronze Age man buried the dead. Plus, there's the first ever prehistoric footprint found in a British cave.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards and Dr Betty O'Brien rely on their expertise and numerous tests to examine the connection between an archaeological site in Donegal and the history of Christianity in Ireland.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards joins the team excavating a massive stone coffin from a building site in Bristol, which should shed light on the Romans' extraordinarily industrious and lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards investigates an impressive coffin dug up in Malesbury Abbey. Among the possible identities of the body within are a Saxon king, and Elmer, a monk who survived his attempt to fly from the top of the Abbey tower.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: A team examines the remains of two crouched bodies found in the isolated Somerset community of Bleadon, where modern DNA testing reveals a picture of the arduous life of iron age farmers.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Today a team works on one of the most impressive Anglo-Saxon graveyards ever discovered, on the US air force base in Suffolk. A warrior is discovered buried besides his horse, encircled by graves holding children, some buried with full size weapon.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: An Archaeologist joins an excavation team as they uncover a rare find from Roman cemetery: a lead coffin, only the second ever to be found in the Roman Winchester. Clues found inside the coffin bring to light the pagan beliefs of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: John visits a couple who wanted to build a garage next to their bungalow.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards joins the excavation of a long-lost chapel and the burials of medieval landowners in a farmer's field in Cheshire. Using science, genealogy and some detective work, the team are able to bring a man face to face with his ancestors.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the Roman sarcophagus discovered at an archaeological site in Spitalfields. The findings include other objects that could reveal some unheard stories from British history.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the artefacts such as bronze brooches, silver rings, amber beads and ivory discovered at an archaeological site in Peterborough.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards investigates the numerous unidentified graves discovered in Buckinghamshire to understand the history of the neighbourhood and its residents.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards tries to piece together the story behind the ruins of Lihou priory. He tries to establish whether the remains found at the site belonged to monks.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards explores excavation sites where remains of human beings are discovered. He uses facial reconstruction technology to illuminate numerous stories lost in the mists of time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Doctor realises that if he can speed up the Vervoids life span with light, they will decay. Using vionesium, he does so, unwittingly causing genocide in the process...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Valeyard's true identity is revealed and the trial aborted, but the Doctor and Mel must pursue his new enemy into the Matrix itself, where nothing is quite what it seems…

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: Mel realises that the Valeyard has created a weapon within the Matrix that will destroy the Time Lords, and the Doctor is forced to rely on the Master for help...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: A newly regenerated Doctor is taken to the Rani's base by Urak the Tetrap, while Mel meets some of the Lakertyans - and falls into one of the Rani's traps.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: The Rani's impersonation of Mel backfires badly because Urak can't tell the difference, while the Doctor attempts to learn the secret of the Loyhargil.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: The furious Rani begins to slaughter the Lakertyans, so Mel rallies the survivors, while the Doctor is readied to donate his mind to the Rani's grotesque experiment.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: As Mel convinces the Lakertyans fight back, the Tetraps turn on the Rani and the Doctor ensures the missile is deflected away from the asteroid.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Paradise Towers
programme.desc: The legendary Paradise Towers is supposed to be the height of luxury but when the Doctor and Mel arrive, they find it is as far from a paradise as possible.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Paradise Towers
programme.desc: With the Doctor condemned to death by the caretakers and their bizarre rulebook, Mel faces cannibalistic OAPS. Is Pex going to be the true hero of Paradise Towers?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Paradise Towers
programme.desc: Mel and Pex play cat and mouse with the lethal cleaner robots while the Doctor and the surviving Kangs learn all about Kroagnon the Great Architect.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Paradise Towers
programme.desc: Kroagnon has been reborn, and is using the Chief Caretaker’s reanimated corpse to move around Paradise Towers. To stop him the Doctor must teach the residents teamwork.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and Mel end up in South Wales along with an assassin and his intended victim...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: Gavrok and the Bannermen have arrived on Earth, searching for Delta and slaughter the holidaymakers without compunction to draw her out.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: As Billy and Ray do what they can to help save Delta and the baby, the Doctor and Goronwy the beekeeper face Gavrok and his Bannermen one last time...

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: Mel and the Doctor are in for a cool reception on the trading colony Iceworld, where they discover excitable teenage waitress Ace, space maverick Sabalom Glitz, and legends of dragons and treasure.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: The time travellers, accompanied by Glitz and Ace, search the ice caves for the treasure which is supposed to be guarded by a fearsome dragon. Little do they are leading Kane straight to it.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: Having sold their souls to him years ago, Kane's disaffected staff plot to kill him. Meanwhile, he plots to obtain the dragon's treasure so he can escape from Iceworld and wreak havoc once more.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: In Shoreditch, 1963, the Doctor’s past begins to catch up with him at the Totter’s Lane junkyard where his adventures began - and to where an old terror is returning.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: Renegade Daleks battle Imperial Daleks for control of the Hand of Omega and Ace takes them on single-handedly at Coal Hill School, while Ratcliffe makes his move.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the difference between the two Dalek factions and why they want a stellar manipulator. He hopes Captain Gilmore's people are up to the task ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The streets of East London shake under a civil war bering fought between the Daleks, as the Doctor forces the Dalek Emperor to reveal himself to be Davros, waging one last battle.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Happiness Patrol
programme.desc: The Happiness Patrol walk the streets of Terra Alpha, destroying all the killjoys, on the orders of the despotic Helen A. And in the Kandy Kitchen, something terrible lurks...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Happiness Patrol
programme.desc: The Doctor escapes the Kandyman while Ace meets the Pipe People. Later, fleeing for her life, Ace is captured and selected to audition for the Happiness Patrol.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Happiness Patrol
programme.desc: As the Doctor leads the Pipe People towards reclaiming their world, Helen A faces betrayal from those closest to her and the Kandyman comes to a sticky end.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: As UNIT is transporting a nuclear warhead around Carbury, knights in armour arrive to continue waging a war that began thousands of years ago, but in a wholly different dimension.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: The Doctor and Ace explore King Arthur’s spaceship deep under Lake Vortigern, while Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart arrives in Carbury where he encounters Morgaine...

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: Furious at her inability to find and engage Arthur in battle, Morgaine threatens to unleash the Destroyer upon the planet unless the Doctor gives her what she wants.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Basset hounds sibling rivalry; aggressive dog; possessive poodle-mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a disrespectful yellow Lab who causes chaos everywhere she goes and some dogs who are misbehaving at the office.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian heads out to help a rare breed of cow named Bertha. She is a champion breeder with a troubling eye infection. Peter returns yet again to the Green's to check on one of their donkeys.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Our Pet Trainer 911 tackles double duty training of two spaniels and brings peace back to their home. Pet Expert Megan Blake teaches us how to play and exercise with a new puppy.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog likes to eat tissue but has trouble with the tissue as it gets stuck to his face and he can't reach; Baron, the Rottweiler eats his specially baked Birthday cookies; Huskie dog licks peanut butter off spoon and keeps sticking out tongue to get it off.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Squirrel plays at home with his stuffed toy, the moose; Millie the dog dancing on her tush; cat chases the toy race cars around the track

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter heads to a neighbour's farm hoping he can save the life of a seriously ill sheep. Her infected foot has become infested with maggots and it's touch and go whether Peter can get her back on her feet.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: After a deadly attack in the mountains, one woman’s only hope for survival is her two loyal canines. And a Quebec woman comes face to face with a deadly snake.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian rushes to dedicated farmer Alan Inman's place to help a mum to be whose baby is breached. Time is of the essence as he struggles with the delivery. Can he get the baby out before it's too late?

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy heads to The Bahamas in search of Potcake Dogs and help Wings of Rescue transport over 200 shelter pets from Nassau to new homes in Nova Scotia, showcasing the dedication and challenges in rescuing and rehoming these animals.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog dribbling a basketball; moose plays tetherball; miracle shot; Basset Hound & Golden Retriever dogs jump and run all over living room, playing tug-o-war.

programme.title: Puppy Love

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Stubborn Pets

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: Forests and jungles are home to most of the Earth's wildlife and biodiversity. Their conservation and protection are crucial to many species and the only guarantee for future generations to enjoy this precious treasure.

programme.title: New Life: Born to Hunt
programme.desc: Baby animals beguile with their innocent charm. But while some remain harmless, others have a deep-rooted instinct. It may take weeks or months of training to hone their skills, but in every corner of the globe predators emerge.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel Marven embarks on thrilling voyages aboard cruise ships, scouring the wilds of Norway, Shetland, Iceland, the Faroe Islands, and Denmark in search of their unique wildlife.

programme.title: The Lembeh Strait Walking Fish
programme.desc: Whale sharks, manta rays, and other big fish were once common in the narrow Lembeh Strait in Indonesia, but overfishing has long since eradicated the larger species.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Zam Expeditions and Kangya Pan Camp

programme.title: Mantises - Masters of Deception
programme.desc: They are killers. They kill with unbelievable precision. They fight Kung Fu style and are seen in Japan as a symbol of vigilance - the mantises.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: In Hanover, Germany, Matthias Schlitte has a genetic condition making his right arm 33% bigger than his left and has trained it to become even bigger and stronger, becoming an arm wrestling champion.

programme.title: Aquarium: An Aquatic Life
programme.desc: This episode will introduce you to some of the Aquariums most weird and wonderful inhabitants, from upside-down Jellyfish to male Seahorses giving birth.

programme.title: Pass the Salt
programme.desc: Pass the Salt is an hour-long investigation into the mysteries of one of our most fundamental elements: salt.

programme.title: Rock Of Ages
programme.desc: Rocks are the memory of our planet. Their constant reforming cycle captures moments in time, so if you want to know about evolution, extinction, or creation, look in the rocks. The question is, are you ready to rock?

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Big move drama as the race against time begins Cheetah Outreach is moving home to Paardevlei in a few months' time, but construction on the new site is only just starting.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Some of the other students question whether Tina's goat case might have influenced her decision regarding the old dog Bobby . Filled with doubt, guilt and regret Tina struggles with her decision.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World.

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: Khao Sok National Park is framed by karst sandstone formations. Mighty ghost-like shaped rocks mark the shores of lake Khao Sok, a huge reservoir on which only a very few fishermen are permitted to live.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: James "Ghost" St. Patrick forms a dangerous alliance with his brother-in-arms, Tommy, and his mortal enemy, Kanan; Angela is implicated in murder and turns to an unlikely ally; Tasha enlists LaKeisha to protect Tariq.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The St. Patrick family grieves Raina while the AUSA's office discusses taking down Ghost and ending Angela's career; Councilman Tate exploits Raina's death; Dre maintains order within his organization.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tasha butt heads on how to grieve; Angela pursues the Jimenez Cartel while Kanan goes after Dre's organization; Tommy confides in LaKeisha about his relationship with Teresi, complicating everyone's lives.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Jason returns; Ghost warns Tommy about Teresi while he hatches a plan with Kanan to rid Tommy of his new family; Angela gets closer to arresting the Jimenez Cartel; Kanan forms an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The St. Patricks celebrate Tariq's birthday without Raina; Ghost is on the outs with Tate and learns Dre is ready to replace him in the legitimate world.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After his spiritual awakening with Rev. Macedon, Ghost confesses his sins to Angela; Angela preps Tasha for federal questioning; Ghost must break his business deal with Tommy when Truth is audited by the IRS.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A man who volunteered in South America fails to return home.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: The team searches for a young woman who disappeared while on spring break.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A groom disappears a few weeks before his wedding.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Two ransom notes are delivered when a wealthy businessman is kidnapped.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A Department of Justice agent is compromised in the press and then vanishes before she can be brought in.

programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Tengo talento, mucho talento
programme.desc: Grandes artistas hispanos muestran su talento frente a famosos jueces, pero al final será el público quien consagre al ganador.

programme.title: Alarma TV
programme.desc: Un show de revista de media hora que se transmite de lunes a sábado donde se presentan noticias únicas de lo que acontece alrededor del mundo.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Tengo talento, mucho talento
programme.desc: Grandes artistas hispanos muestran su talento frente a famosos jueces, pero al final será el público quien consagre al ganador.

programme.desc: Un show de revista de media hora que se transmite de lunes a sábado donde se presentan noticias únicas de lo que acontece alrededor del mundo.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Programa de juegos en donde los concursantes compiten en desafíos de un minuto con niveles crecientes de dificultad para tener la oportunidad de ganar un premio en efectivo.

programme.title: Noches con Platanito
programme.desc: Un talk show cómico, diferente y entretenido con Platanito, quien entrevistará a importantes personajes de la farándula, concursos y rutinas de comedia.

programme.title: Los dos rivales
programme.desc: Los nombres de dos niños son cambiados al nacer, el niño recibe el nombre de su hermana y ella el de él.

programme.title: Encrucijada
programme.desc: Historias reales sobre la bifurcación del camino de diferentes personas, que llevan a cambios en el futuro y hacen frente a una encrucijada.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: A que no puedes
programme.desc: Emocionante juego que enfrenta a dos equipos de celebridades en su intento por realizar pruebas y retos únicos. El equipo que complete con éxito la tarea, ganará dinero para una obra de ayuda social.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Mi sueño es bailar
programme.desc: Celebridades ayudan a los participantes a hacer sus sueños realidad. Durante cada episodio la pareja con más puntos obtiene la oportunidad de escoger cual sueño se hará realidad.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: A man claims his intoxicated roommate taunted him and begged him to hit her, hoping the police would get involved and take him away.; A mysterious accident leads to a mysteriously fraudulent money-order in an outrageous hit-and-run story.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A witness testifies on behalf of a man who claims a fellow motorist backed into him; the defendant says there were no witnesses at the accident scene.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A veteran NY state judge joins the bench to rule on a dramatic May-September romance involving jewelry, plastic surgery and heartbreak.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A 19-year-old aspiring athlete claims his new school offered substandard classes and that his property was stolen.; A man claims that his fellow coach came to him begging for child support money but then refused to pay him back.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1975 matchup between the Reds and the Red Sox. After trailing 3-0 in Game 7, Cincinnati battled back to take the lead in the 9th and capture their first World Series of the decade, giving birth to the "Big Red Machine

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/2010: Cliff Lee puts together an impressive outing to pull off a complete game with 11 strikeouts in the Rangers' 5-1 win against the Rays in the 2010 American League Division Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/23/2010: Juan Uribe hit a tie-breaking solo home run in the 8th inning of the Giants' 3-2 win over the Phillies to take the 2010 National League Championship Series in six games.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/27/11: The D-backs allowed five runs in the top of the 10th inning, but after scoring a couple of runs, Ryan Roberts came to the plate and sent the fans to home happy with a walk-off grand slam against the Dodgers.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/01: The Rangers exploded for a nine-run 3rd inning against the Tigers and would go on to win 15-5, clinching the American League pennant in six games.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Hace 3 años Daney hizo una audición para doblar voces en un canal de Youtube, ganó y conoció al amor de su vida; le pidió matrimonio y aceptó pero nunca ha visto su cara. Necesita ayuda urgente.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Karla ha encontrado perfiles falsos en la red, utilizando sus fotografías, los ha reportado; algunos han desaparecido y en otros aparece bloqueada. Su mayor preocupación es: ¿qué pueden estar haciendo con esos perfiles falsos? Y, ¿quién está detrás?

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Why would anyone confess to a murder they didn’t commit? Ben’s trying to help his reporter friend beat a murder charge, but when she’s caught in a lie even Ben isn’t convinced she’s innocent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When blackmail leads to murder, the evidence leads straight to Ben’s old reporter friend. With a client who’s not talking, even Ben is starting to have his doubts. While everyone thinks she is guilty, Ben must work hard to prove his friend’s innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock suspects foul play when a college basketball coach is accused of pay-offs, point-shaving, and murder. As tempers flare and accusations run wild, Matlock makes an enlightening discovery, the head of the booster club was bribing recruits

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The attraction is fatal! Matlock defends an obsessive suitor framed for allegedly murdering the love of his life, a dating service candidate so repelled by his presence that she had a restraining order to keep him away.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Joining forces with an old friend and adversary, Julie March, Matlock attempts to reverse a murder sentence and unravel a case of corruption, conspiracy, and perjury.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: One of Ben’s old clients is charged with bank robbery, again. The only witness is a precocious twelve-year-old boy who presents more than a handful of problems for Matlock. One of them is the boy’s fee for helping out. He wants Matlock to defend his dad.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Katie Clark, the new assistant D.A. in town, is trying to juggle the demands of being a single parent and perform a stellar job on her first prosecution case. But, to her horror, she learns that the suspect she’s trying to convict is her former lover.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Rubble saves Jake from an avalanche, receives his vehicle and becomes a member of the PAW Patrol; the Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Wally the Walrus is tangled in an old fishing net.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy becomes annoyed when Lori and Leni start watching her vampire show because of a cute new character; Mom gets community service for racking up tickets.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up in an effort to make gym class better; Luan teaches Lucy how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family; Lori and Bobby worry that long-distance dating is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy; Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time; Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana springs into action when she learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction; when Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job, but can't give up the perks that come along with it; when the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their baby-sitting club, but she quickly proves to be too aggressive; Ronnie Anne's grandparents decide to spy on her when she wants to go downtown.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hoping to win a songwriting contest, Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound or try to make something that the whole world will love.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs; Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together; when Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to the Royal Woods House of Terror, Lincoln and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears; Lola discovers that Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan pranks the entire household every year on April Fools' Day, but this year Lincoln has a plan to avoid her pranks; the Loud children make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for their mother, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change things up; Lori develops the yips when she finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favorites; when Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a million soccer goal, Lynn tries to be supportive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-book way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over; Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods and discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan tries out for the school play to get closer to her crush, Benny; when Clyde and schoolmate Zach begin bonding over a mutual interest in antiques, Lincoln quickly finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions, but their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with Sid, a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs; when it looks like another couple might get it first, the girls resort to sabotage to try and dissuade them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage; desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero; Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help; Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete; Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Louds rent a boat for a relaxing day trip on the lake, but the family ends up marooned on a desert island; Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, investigate when they discover a frozen food company is using Dad's recipes.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift; Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori takes a job as a waitress at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated; spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection; Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school; Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Stella's music box disappears at school, the gang immediately suspects a student urban legend known as the Rat Beast; after a night of zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln find an empty Loud house and assume it's a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference; Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck; when the girls get more attention, the boys do whatever it takes to gain focus.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: SpongeBob cuenta chistes maliciosos; SpongeBob falla su examen de conducir; SpongeBob cuida el hogar de Mermaid Man y Barnacle Boy.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: En `Full Moon' Arnold se echa la culpa por algo que él no hizo, y en `Ms. Pataki, Student Teacher', Olga, la hermana mayor de Helga, llega a la escuela.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: En `Big Gino', Sid está en problemas cuando él hace negocios con el niño usurero local y en `Jamie O in Love', el hermano mayor de Gerald se enamora de una chica y empieza a ser agradable con Gerald.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Miriam va a una reunión importante; Arnold enseña a Oskar a leer.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Todos empiezan a tener mala suerte en `Friday The 13th' , y en `Headless Cabbie', Arnold les dice a los chicos una historia que es un poco tenebrosa.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga confía en un pájaro; Timberly come dulces.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold invita a Lila a una cita durante un festival de quesos. Harol empieza una dieta porque quiere adelgazar.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga se convierte en una niña famosa al empezar a trabajar como modelo de ropa. La pandilla deja de escuchar los consejos de Arnold.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold y el abuelo discuten con Helga y Gran Bob, así que los adultos deciden arreglar las cosas con un enfrentamiento. Rhonda y Patty terminan estudiando en la misma escuela.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold y Abuelo visitan el memorial de los Veteranos. Abuelo relata algunas hazañas sobre sus días militares, mientras que Gerald es la primera decepción en la historia de su padre.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: El Abuelo vuelve de nuevo a la escuela para así poder graduarse; el Sr. Simmons da a la clase una misión para acoplar y cuidar un huevo durante el fin de semana para aprender el trabajo en equipo y responsabilidad.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnie, el primo de Arnold, llega de visita y todo mundo piensa que él es un gran perdedor, excepto Lila. Luego, Susie, la esposa de Oskar, acepta cuidar al bebé de su primo.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga, sonámbula, camina dormida hasta la casa de Arnold. Arnold participa en una competencia que enfrenta a las familias.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Un superhéroe salva a Arnold; Harold y Helga pierden el autobús mientras están en un viaje escolar.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: En `Synchronised Swimming', el entrenador Wittenberg necesita formar un equipo de nado sincronizado para salvar su trabajo, luego en `Grandpa's Sister', Mitzi, aparece y le demuestra su amor a todos, excepto a Grandpa.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: En `Helga As Lila' Helga descubre que Arnold admira Lila por su ingenio, por lo que decide copiarla, y en `Mr. Green Runs For Office' Arnold ayuda al Sr. Green competir para concejal de la ciudad.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Alguien recomienda la ayuda psicológica para Helga.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: El baladista Dino Spumoni finge su propia muerte con el fin de incrementar su popularidad, y le deja su futuro récord de ventas a Arnold.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Por pura coincidencia, las familias de Arnold y Helga pasan las vacaciones en la misma playa. Helga está entusiasmada, pero todo cambia cuando Arnold conoce a Summer, una chica de la que se enamora.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Sid piensa que Stinky es un vampiro en `Sid the Vampire Slayer', y luego en `Big Sis', Olga llega a casa y se convierte en la hermana mayor de Lila.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: El nuevo juego favorito de Gerald le desagrada a Arnold en `Gerald's Game'; En `Fishing Trip' los chicos salen a pescar.

programme.title: ¡Oye, Arnold!
programme.desc: Los chicos descubren algo de dinero, pero Arnold quieren que lo entreguen a la policía en `Bag of Money', y luego en `Principal Simmons', el señor Simmons se convierte en el director tras la renuncia del señor Wartz.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Mientras participan en la obra escolar, Poof y Foop compiten para ganarse los afectos de Goldie Goldenglow.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El pequeño Timmy Turner se mete en un problema tras hacer su deseo un millón. El Consejo de Hadas decide que debe ser juzgado por ser el peor ahijado de la historia.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El Consejo de Hadas pone a Timmy en un juicio después de que él pide su millonésimo deseo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Un deseo previo de Timmy por el Planeta de los Padres regresa para embrujarlo cuando los Padres llegan para robarle a su madre.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los enemigos de Timmy forman una liga a la que llaman los P.E.R.D.E.D.O.R.E.S. con el fin de aniquilarlo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los padres de Timmy descubren que él tiene padrinos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy adopta un travieso perro hada.

programme.desc: Tony decides to relocate for a year to write the great Vietnamese novel.

programme.desc: Tony steps away from the tourists and into the Venice of Venetians.

programme.desc: Tony explores the cuisine, culture and heritage of Saudi Arabia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony samples an unusual cut of warthog meat with Kalahari bushmen.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony and Zamir team up for a trip to the former Soviet Republic of Ukraine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Russian- and Korean-influenced cuisine in Manchurian winter.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Sydney, Tony experiences enviable food and drink in the land down under.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: The soul of Cuba is found in a baseball stadium packed with exuberant fans.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony visits with food-obsessed individuals.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony searches for the heroes of the food scene in the American Heartland.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony answers the top 10 viewer questions from an online poll.

programme.desc: Tony visits with locals to get a taste of what it means to be Egyptian.

programme.desc: Tony joins the band The Black Keys for some serious BBQ in Kansas City.
